'''Fremond III''' was a planet in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==History==
Fremond III was home to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Rebels were caught during an attempt to infiltrate [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Glaffold]]'s government offices. Most of them were then killed or captured during the [[Siege on Fremond III|siege]] of a fortified warehouse by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.<ref name="GNN9" />
